news.title: Mantis Biotech is making ‘digital twins’ of humans to help solve medicine’s data availability problem
news.description: Mantis takes disparate sources of data to make synthetic datasets that can be used to build so-called "digital twins" of the human body, representing anatomy, physiology and behavior.

news.title: ScaleOps raises $130M to improve computing efficiency amid AI demand
news.description: ScaleOps just raised $130M to tackle GPU shortages and soaring AI cloud costs by automating infrastructure in real time.

news.title: AI chip startup Rebellions raises $400 million at $2.3B valuation in pre-IPO round
news.description: The startup, which is planning to go public later this year, designs chips specifically for AI inference, another challenger to Nvidia's dominance.

news.title: Mistral AI raises $830M in debt to set up a data center near Paris
news.description: Mistral aims to start operating the data center by the second quarter of 2026.

news.title: Qodo raises $70M for code verification as AI coding scales
news.description: As AI floods software development with code, Qodo is betting the real challenge is making sure it actually works.

news.title: AI Research Is Getting Harder to Separate From Geopolitics
news.description: A policy change announced by NeurIPS, the world’s leading AI research conference, drew widespread backlash from Chinese researchers this week and then was quickly reversed.

news.title: The Latest AI Documentary Asks: Just How Scared Should We Be?
news.description: The AI Doc: Or How I Became an Apocaloptimist seeks the middle ground on a polarizing technology—and ends up letting tech execs like Sam Altman off the hook.
